sourceSnapshot.bodyTextExcerpt: Inteligência que trabalhapelo seu negócio A IA sugere Toda ação começa como uma sugestão, nunca como algo já feito. Sugestão aguardando revisão Você está no controle Nada é executado sem regras claras de aprovação. Você decide o que acontece. Aprovar Recusar Tudo fica registrado Cada ação é guardada, rastreável e pode ser desfeita se precisar. Agendamento confirmado Mensagem enviada ao cliente Pagamento registrado Automação com segurança, do jeito certo. Começar pular class Component extends DCLogic { state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false }; canvasR
sourceSnapshot.domOuterHtml:
<html><head><style>
    .sc-placeholder{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;overflow:hidden}
    @keyframes sc-shine{0%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing{position:relative;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 5%,transparent);
      border-color:transparent}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing::before{content:'';
      position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(217,119,87,0) 25%,rgba(247,225,211,.95) 37%,rgba(217,119,87,0) 63%);
      background-size:400% 100%;animation:sc-shine 1.4s ease infinite}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-placeholder)::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-interp.sc-missing)::before{animation:none;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 8%,transparent)}
    .sc-placeholder-error{padding:4px 8px;font:11px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.7);word-break:break-word}
    .sc-interp.sc-missing{display:inline-block;width:2em;height:1em;overflow:hidden;
      vertical-align:text-bottom;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;color:transparent;
      user-select:none}
    .sc-interp.sc-unresolved{font-family:ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:.85em;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);border-radius:3px;
      padding:0 3px}
    .sc-host.sc-has-error{position:relative}
    .sc-logic-error{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;z-index:2147483647;max-width:60ch;
      padding:6px 10px;background:#b00020;color:#fff;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      border-radius:4px;white-space:pre-wrap;pointer-events:none}
    /* Mirrors PRINT_BASELINE_CSS in apps/web deck-stage-export.ts — keep both
       in sync until dc-runtime regains a build step. */
    @media print {
      @page { margin: 0.5cm; }
      figure, table { break-inside: avoid; }
      #dc-root, #dc-root > .sc-host { height: auto; }
      *, *::before, *::after {
        print-color-adjust: exact; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
        backdrop-filter: none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
        animation-delay: -99s !important; animation-duration: .001s !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; animation-fill-mode: both !important;
        animation-play-state: running !important; transition-duration: 0s !important;
      }
    }
  </style><script>window.__resources = {};</script>

    html, body {
      margin: 0; padding: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #05070b;
    }
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }

    @keyframes floatY {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
      50%       { transform: translateY(-7px); }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      [data-anim-float] { animation: none !important; }

<body>

<div id="dc-root"><div class="sc-host" data-sc-name="ARIS_Onboarding"><div data-dc-tpl="5" style="position: fixed; inset: 0px; overflow: hidden; background: rgb(5, 7, 11);">

  
  <div data-dc-tpl="6" data-screen="0" data-screen-label="01 — Abertura" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; transform: translateX(0px); opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto;">
    <canvas data-dc-tpl="7" width="1440" height="2400" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block;"></canvas>
    
    <div data-dc-tpl="8" style="position: absolute; top: calc(50% + 78px); left: 0px; right: 0px; text-align: center; padding-left: 32px; padding-right: 32px; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.9s;">
      <p data-dc-tpl="9" style="font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgb(126, 144, 168); margin: 0px; line-height: 1.85;">Inteligência que trabalha<br data-dc-tpl="10">pelo seu negócio</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  
  <div data-dc-tpl="11" data-screen="1" data-screen-label="02 — A IA sugere" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0px clamp(24px, 8vw, 64px); transform: translateX(24px); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;">
    <div data-dc-tpl="12" style="width: 100%; max-width: 460px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">

      <div data-dc-tpl="13" data-anim-icon="" style="margin-bottom: 52px;">
        <svg data-dc-tpl="14" data-anim-float="" width="54" height="54" viewBox="0 0 54 54" fill="none" style="display: block; animation: 3.2s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running floatY;">
          <circle data-dc-tpl="15" cx="9" cy="27" r="4.5" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
          <line data-dc-tpl="16" x1="13.5" y1="27" x2="21" y2="27" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></line>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="17" cx="27" cy="27" r="4" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
          <line data-dc-tpl="18" x1="30.8" y1="23.4" x2="40" y2="13" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></line>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="19" cx="44" cy="10" r="4" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
          <line data-dc-tpl="20" x1="30.8" y1="30.6" x2="40" y2="41" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></line>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="21" cx="44" cy="44" r="4" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
        </svg>
      </div>

      <div data-dc-tpl="22" data-anim-text="">
        <h2 data-dc-tpl="23" style="font-family: "Crimson Text", serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 42px; line-height: 1.2; color: rgb(232, 234, 240); margin: 0px 0px 20px; letter-spacing: -0.3px;">A IA sugere</h2>
        <p data-dc-tpl="24" style="font-family: Lora, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(15px, 4.2vw, 18px); line-height: 1.78; color: rgb(94, 111, 133); margin: 0px auto; max-width: 300px;">Toda ação começa como uma sugestão, nunca como algo já feito.</p>

        
        <div data-dc-tpl="25" aria-hidden="true" style="margin-top: 44px; width: 248px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 13px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(111, 168, 232, 0.2); border-radius: 11px; background: rgba(111, 168, 232, 0.043); opacity: 0.55; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;">
          <svg data-dc-tpl="26" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" style="flex-shrink: 0;">
            <circle data-dc-tpl="27" cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
            <path data-dc-tpl="28" d="M12 7.5 L12 12 L15 14" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round" strokelinejoin="round"></path>
          </svg>
          <span data-dc-tpl="29" style="font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(126, 144, 168); letter-spacing: 0.01em;">Sugestão aguardando revisão</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  
  <div data-dc-tpl="30" data-screen="2" data-screen-label="03 — Você está no controle" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0px clamp(24px, 8vw, 64px); transform: translateX(24px); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;">
    <div data-dc-tpl="31" style="width: 100%; max-width: 460px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">

      <div data-dc-tpl="32" data-anim-icon="" style="margin-bottom: 52px;">
        <svg data-dc-tpl="33" data-anim-float="" width="54" height="54" viewBox="0 0 54 54" fill="none" style="display: block; animation: 3.2s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite normal none running floatY;">
          <path data-dc-tpl="34" d="M27 5 L45 14 L45 28 C45 40 27 49 27 49 C27 49 9 40 9 28 L9 14 Z" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinejoin="round"></path>
          <rect data-dc-tpl="35" x="18.5" y="30" width="17" height="12" rx="3" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></rect>
          <path data-dc-tpl="36" d="M22 30 L22 24 C22 20 32 20 32 24 L32 30" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></path>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="37" cx="27" cy="36" r="2" fill="#6fa8e8"></circle>
        </svg>
      </div>

      <div data-dc-tpl="38" data-anim-text="">
        <h2 data-dc-tpl="39" style="font-family: "Crimson Text", serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 42px; line-height: 1.2; color: rgb(232, 234, 240); margin: 0px 0px 20px; letter-spacing: -0.3px;">Você está no controle</h2>
        <p data-dc-tpl="40" style="font-family: Lora, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(15px, 4.2vw, 18px); line-height: 1.78; color: rgb(94, 111, 133); margin: 0px auto; max-width: 300px;">Nada é executado sem regras claras de aprovação. Você decide o que acontece.</p>

        
        <div data-dc-tpl="41" aria-hidden="true" style="margin-top: 44px; display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; opacity: 0.55;">

      <div data-dc-tpl="101" style="height: 5px; width: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.4s;"></div>

      <div data-dc-tpl="103" style="height: 5px; width: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.4s;"></div>
    </button>
    <button data-dc-tpl="104" style="background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; padding: 12px 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
      <div data-dc-tpl="105" style="height: 5px; width: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.4s;"></div>
    </button>
  </div></div></div></div>
<script type="text/x-dc" data-dc-script="">
class Component extends DCLogic {
  state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false };

  canvasRef    = React.createRef();
  containerRef = React.createRef();

  _transitioning  = false;
  _particlesDone  = false;
  _rafId          = null;
  _touchStartX    = 0;
  _touchStartY    = 0;
  _cleanupFns     = [];

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Lifecycle
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  componentDidMount() {
    this._initScreens();
    this._initCanvas();
    this._initTouch();

    const onKey = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') this.navigate(1);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   this.navigate(-1);
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey));
  }

  componentWillUnmount() {
    if (this._rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    this._cleanupFns.forEach(fn => fn());
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Screen init
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initScreens() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]').forEach((s, i) => {
      s.style.transform    = 'translateX(0)';
      s.style.opacity      = i === 0 ? '1' : '0';
      s.style.pointerEvents = i === 0 ? 'auto' : 'none';
      if (i > 0) s.style.transform = 'translateX(24px)';
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Navigation
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  navigate(dir) {
    if (this.state.currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone) this._finishAnim();
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    const next = currentScreen + dir;
    if (next < 0 || next > 4 || this._transitioning) return;
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, next, dir > 0 ? 1 : -1);
  }

  jumpTo(idx) {
    if (this._transitioning) return;
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    if (idx === currentScreen) return;
    if (currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone && idx > 0) this._finishAnim();
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, idx, idx > currentScreen ? 1 : -1);
  }

  _doTransition(from, to, dir) {
    this._transitioning = true;
    this.setState({ currentScreen: to });

    const c   = this.containerRef.current;
    const all = [...c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]')];
    const out = all[from];
    const inn = all[to];

    // Park off-screen
    all.forEach((s, i) => {
      if (i !== from && i !== to) {
        s.style.transition    = 'none';
        s.style.opacity       = '0';
        s.style.transform     = `translateX(${i < from ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
        s.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }
    });

    // Reset outgoing stagger elements so they don't hold stale transforms
    this._resetStagger(out);

    // Place incoming off-screen
    inn.style.transition  = 'none';
    inn.style.opacity     = '0';
    inn.style.transform   = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '24px' : '-24px'})`;
    inn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

    void inn.getBoundingClientRect(); // flush

    const DUR  = 460;
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';
    const FADE = 'cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';

    // Slide out
    out.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.55)}ms ${FADE}`;
    out.style.transform  = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
    out.style.opacity    = '0';

    // Slide in
    inn.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.65)}ms ${FADE}`;
    inn.style.transform  = 'translateX(0)';
    inn.style.opacity    = '1';

    // Stagger icon → text
    this._triggerStagger(inn);

    setTimeout(() => {
      out.style.transition    = 'none';
      out.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      inn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
      this._transitioning     = false;
    }, DUR + 80);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Stagger helpers
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _resetStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    if (icon) { icon.style.transition = 'none'; icon.style.transform = ''; icon.style.opacity = ''; }
    if (text) { text.style.transition = 'none'; text.style.transform = ''; text.style.opacity = ''; }
  }

  _triggerStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';

    const animEl = (el, delay) => {
      if (!el) return;
      el.style.transition = 'none';
      el.style.transform  = 'translateY(18px)';
      void el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const run = () => {
        el.style.transition = `transform 0.52s ${EASE}`;
        el.style.transform  = 'translateY(0)';
      };
      delay ? setTimeout(run, delay) : run();
    };

    animEl(icon, 0);
    animEl(text, 96);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Touch
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initTouch() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    const onStart = (e) => {
      this._touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      this._touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
    };
    const onEnd = (e) => {
      const dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - this._touchStartX;
      const dy = Math.abs(e.changedTouches[0].clientY - this._touchStartY);
      if (Math.abs(dx) > 40 && dy < 80) this.navigate(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
    };
    c.addEventListener('touchstart', onStart, { passive: true });
    c.addEventListener('touchend',   onEnd,   { passive: true });
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => {
      c.removeEventListener('touchstart', onStart);
      c.removeEventListener('touchend',   onEnd);
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Canvas / Particles
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initCanvas() {
    const tryStart = () => {
      const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
      if (!canvas) { setTimeout(tryStart, 100); return; }

      // Measure actual rendered size after layout
      setTimeout(() => {
        const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const W = Math.round(r.width)  || window.innerWidth;
        const H = Math.round(r.height) || window.innerHeight;
        canvas.width  = W;
        canvas.height = H;

        canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (this._particlesDone) this.navigate(1);
        });

        const run = () => this._runParticles(W, H);
        (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready)
          ? document.fonts.ready.then(run)
          : setTimeout(run, 700);
      }, 80);
    };
    tryStart();
  }

  _finishAnim() {
    if (this._rafId) { cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId); this._rafId = null; }
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (canvas) {
      const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      const fs  = this._fontSize(W);
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle   = '#e8eaf0';
      ctx.font        = `700 ${fs}px Charm`;
      ctx.textAlign   = 'center';
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
      ctx.fillText('ARIS', W / 2, H / 2);
    }
    this._particlesDone = true;
    this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
  }

  _fontSize(W) {
    return Math.min(Math.max(Math.round(W * 0.22), 72), 108);
  }

  _runParticles(W, H) {
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx  = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const CX   = W / 2;
    const CY   = H / 2;
    const FS   = this._fontSize(W);

    // Sample letter pixels from an offscreen canvas
    const off  = document.createElement('canvas');
    off.width  = W; off.height = H;
    const oc   = off.getContext('2d');
    oc.fillStyle = '#fff';
    oc.font      = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
    oc.textAlign = 'center';
    oc.textBaseline = 'middle';
    oc.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);

    const { data } = oc.getImageData(0, 0, W, H);
    const targets  = [];
    const STEP     = Math.max(4, Math.round(W / 88));

    for (let y = 0; y < H; y += STEP) {
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x += STEP) {
        if (data[(y * W + x) * 4 + 3] > 100) {
          targets.push({ x: x + STEP / 2, y: y + STEP / 2 });
        }
      }
    }

    if (!targets.length) { setTimeout(() => this._runParticles(W, H), 300); return; }

    // Shuffle so particles don't converge in raster order
    for (let i = targets.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      [targets[i], targets[j]] = [targets[j], targets[i]];
    }

    const SPREAD = Math.min(W, H) * 0.55;
    const particles = targets.map(t => {
      const ang = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const r   = 60  + Math.random() * SPREAD;
      const vx  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const vy  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const sx  = CX + Math.cos(ang) * r;
      const sy  = CY + Math.sin(ang) * r;
      return {
        sx, sy,
        endX: sx + vx * 30,
        endY: sy + vy * 30,
        targetX: t.x,
        targetY: t.y,
        vx, vy,
        size:  0.8 + Math.random() * 1.5,
        delay: Math.random() * 0.32,
      };
    });

    const T0    = performance.now();
    const DR    = 420;    // drift phase ms
    const CV    = 1900;   // converge phase ms
    const ST    = 340;    // settle/text fade ms
    const TOTAL = DR + CV + ST;

    const loop = (now) => {
      if (this._particlesDone) return;
      const el = now - T0;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

      particles.forEach(p => {
        const pe = el - p.delay * DR;
        if (pe <= 0) return;

        let px, py, alpha;

        if (pe < DR) {
          const dt = pe / DR;
          px    = p.sx + p.vx * dt * 30;
          py    = p.sy + p.vy * dt * 30;
          alpha = Math.min(dt * 2.2, 0.62);
          ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
          ctx.fillStyle   = '#6fa8e8';
        } else {
          const ct   = Math.min((pe - DR) / CV, 1);
          const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - ct, 4); // quartic ease-out
          px    = p.endX + (p.targetX - p.endX) * ease;
          py    = p.endY + (p.targetY - p.endY) * ease;
          alpha = 0.62 + ease * 0.38;
          // Interpolate blue (#6fa8e8) → near-white (#e8eaf0)
          const rr = Math.round(111 + (232 - 111) * ease);
          const gg = Math.round(168 + (234 - 168) * ease);
          const bb = Math.round(232 + (240 - 232) * ease);
          ctx.globalAlpha = Math.min(alpha, 1);
          ctx.fillStyle   = `rgb(${rr},${gg},${bb})`;
        }

        const sz = p.size * (pe < DR ? 1 : 1 + ((pe - DR) / CV) * 0.3);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(px, py, sz, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      });

      // Cross-fade crisp wordmark over settled dots
      if (el > DR + CV) {
        const t = Math.min((el - DR - CV) / ST, 1);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = t;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
      }

      if (el < TOTAL) {
        this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
      } else {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = 1;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
        this._particlesDone = true;
        this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
      }
    };

    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // renderVals
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  renderVals() {
    const { currentScreen, taglineVisible, entered } = this.state;

    const dotColor = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '#6fa8e8' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
    const dotWidth = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '22px' : '6px';

    return {
      containerRef: this.containerRef,
      canvasRef:    this.canvasRef,

      // Nav handlers
      goNext: () => this.navigate(1),
      goPrev: () => this.navigate(-1),
      skip:   () => this.jumpTo(4),
      goTo0:  () => this.jumpTo(0),
      goTo1:  () => this.jumpTo(1),
      goTo2:  () => this.jumpTo(2),
      goTo3:  () => this.jumpTo(3),
      goTo4:  () => this.jumpTo(4),

      // Visibility
      showPrev: currentScreen > 0,
      showNext: currentScreen < 4,
      showSkip: currentScreen < 4,

      // Tagline fade on screen 0
      taglineOpacity: taglineVisible ? '1' : '0',

      // Closing screen
      handleEntrar: () => this.setState({ entered: true }),
      comecarlabel:  entered ? 'Bem-vindo.' : 'Começar',
      entrarBg:     entered ? '#0d2e56' : '#1a4a8a',

      // Progress dots
      d0w: dotWidth(0), d0c: dotColor(0),
      d1w: dotWidth(1), d1c: dotColor(1),
      d2w: dotWidth(2), d2c: dotColor(2),
      d3w: dotWidth(3), d3c: dotColor(3),
      d4w: dotWidth(4), d4c: dotColor(4),
    };
  }
}
</script>


</body></html>

sourceSnapshot.bodyTextExcerpt: Inteligência que trabalhapelo seu negócio A IA sugere Toda ação começa como uma sugestão, nunca como algo já feito. Sugestão aguardando revisão Você está no controle Nada é executado sem regras claras de aprovação. Você decide o que acontece. Aprovar Recusar Tudo fica registrado Cada ação é guardada, rastreável e pode ser desfeita se precisar. Agendamento confirmado Mensagem enviada ao cliente Pagamento registrado Automação com segurança, do jeito certo. Começar pular class Component extends DCLogic { state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false }; canvasR

<html><head><style>
    .sc-placeholder{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;overflow:hidden}
    @keyframes sc-shine{0%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing{position:relative;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 5%,transparent);
      border-color:transparent}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing::before{content:'';
      position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(217,119,87,0) 25%,rgba(247,225,211,.95) 37%,rgba(217,119,87,0) 63%);
      background-size:400% 100%;animation:sc-shine 1.4s ease infinite}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-placeholder)::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-interp.sc-missing)::before{animation:none;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 8%,transparent)}
    .sc-placeholder-error{padding:4px 8px;font:11px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.7);word-break:break-word}
    .sc-interp.sc-missing{display:inline-block;width:2em;height:1em;overflow:hidden;
      vertical-align:text-bottom;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;color:transparent;
      user-select:none}
    .sc-interp.sc-unresolved{font-family:ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:.85em;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);border-radius:3px;
      padding:0 3px}
    .sc-host.sc-has-error{position:relative}
    .sc-logic-error{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;z-index:2147483647;max-width:60ch;
      padding:6px 10px;background:#b00020;color:#fff;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      border-radius:4px;white-space:pre-wrap;pointer-events:none}
    /* Mirrors PRINT_BASELINE_CSS in apps/web deck-stage-export.ts — keep both
       in sync until dc-runtime regains a build step. */
    @media print {
      @page { margin: 0.5cm; }
      figure, table { break-inside: avoid; }
      #dc-root, #dc-root > .sc-host { height: auto; }
      *, *::before, *::after {
        print-color-adjust: exact; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
        backdrop-filter: none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
        animation-delay: -99s !important; animation-duration: .001s !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; animation-fill-mode: both !important;
        animation-play-state: running !important; transition-duration: 0s !important;
      }
    }
  </style><script>window.__resources = {};</script>

</style><style data-dc-tpl="4">
    html, body {
      margin: 0; padding: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #05070b;
    }
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }

    @keyframes floatY {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
      50%       { transform: translateY(-7px); }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      [data-anim-float] { animation: none !important; }
    }
  </style></head>
<body>

<div id="dc-root"><div class="sc-host" data-sc-name="ARIS_Onboarding"><div data-dc-tpl="5" style="position: fixed; inset: 0px; overflow: hidden; background: rgb(5, 7, 11);">

  
  <div data-dc-tpl="6" data-screen="0" data-screen-label="01 — Abertura" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; transform: translateX(0px); opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto;">
    <canvas data-dc-tpl="7" width="1440" height="2400" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block;"></canvas>
    
    <div data-dc-tpl="8" style="position: absolute; top: calc(50% + 78px); left: 0px; right: 0px; text-align: center; padding-left: 32px; padding-right: 32px; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.9s;">
      <p data-dc-tpl="9" style="font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgb(126, 144, 168); margin: 0px; line-height: 1.85;">Inteligência que trabalha<br data-dc-tpl="10">pelo seu negócio</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  
  <div data-dc-tpl="11" data-screen="1" data-screen-label="02 — A IA sugere" style="position: absolute; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0px clamp(24px, 8vw, 64px); transform: translateX(24px); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;">
    <div data-dc-tpl="12" style="width: 100%; max-width: 460px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">

      <div data-dc-tpl="13" data-anim-icon="" style="margin-bottom: 52px;">
        <svg data-dc-tpl="14" data-anim-float="" width="54" height="54" viewBox="0 0 54 54" fill="none" style="display: block; animation: 3.2s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running floatY;">
          <circle data-dc-tpl="15" cx="9" cy="27" r="4.5" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
          <line data-dc-tpl="16" x1="13.5" y1="27" x2="21" y2="27" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></line>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="17" cx="27" cy="27" r="4" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
          <line data-dc-tpl="18" x1="30.8" y1="23.4" x2="40" y2="13" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></line>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="19" cx="44" cy="10" r="4" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
          <line data-dc-tpl="20" x1="30.8" y1="30.6" x2="40" y2="41" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round"></line>
          <circle data-dc-tpl="21" cx="44" cy="44" r="4" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
        </svg>
      </div>

      <div data-dc-tpl="22" data-anim-text="">
        <h2 data-dc-tpl="23" style="font-family: "Crimson Text", serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 42px; line-height: 1.2; color: rgb(232, 234, 240); margin: 0px 0px 20px; letter-spacing: -0.3px;">A IA sugere</h2>
        <p data-dc-tpl="24" style="font-family: Lora, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(15px, 4.2vw, 18px); line-height: 1.78; color: rgb(94, 111, 133); margin: 0px auto; max-width: 300px;">Toda ação começa como uma sugestão, nunca como algo já feito.</p>

        
        <div data-dc-tpl="25" aria-hidden="true" style="margin-top: 44px; width: 248px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 13px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(111, 168, 232, 0.2); border-radius: 11px; background: rgba(111, 168, 232, 0.043); opacity: 0.55; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;">
          <svg data-dc-tpl="26" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" style="flex-shrink: 0;">
            <circle data-dc-tpl="27" cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6"></circle>
            <path data-dc-tpl="28" d="M12 7.5 L12 12 L15 14" stroke="#6fa8e8" strokewidth="1.6" strokelinecap="round" strokelinejoin="round"></path>
          </svg>
          <span data-dc-tpl="29" style="font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(126, 144, 168); letter-spacing: 0.01em;">Sugestão aguardando revisão</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div data-dc-tpl="99" style="height: 5px; width: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.4s;"></div>

      <div data-dc-tpl="103" style="height: 5px; width: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.4s;"></div>

    <button data-dc-tpl="104" style="background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; padding: 12px 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
      <div data-dc-tpl="105" style="height: 5px; width: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.4s;"></div>
    </button>
  </div></div></div></div>
<script type="text/x-dc" data-dc-script="">
class Component extends DCLogic {
  state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false };

  canvasRef    = React.createRef();
  containerRef = React.createRef();

  _transitioning  = false;
  _particlesDone  = false;
  _rafId          = null;
  _touchStartX    = 0;
  _touchStartY    = 0;
  _cleanupFns     = [];

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Lifecycle
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  componentDidMount() {
    this._initScreens();
    this._initCanvas();
    this._initTouch();

    const onKey = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') this.navigate(1);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   this.navigate(-1);
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey));
  }

  componentWillUnmount() {
    if (this._rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    this._cleanupFns.forEach(fn => fn());
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Screen init
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initScreens() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]').forEach((s, i) => {
      s.style.transform    = 'translateX(0)';
      s.style.opacity      = i === 0 ? '1' : '0';
      s.style.pointerEvents = i === 0 ? 'auto' : 'none';
      if (i > 0) s.style.transform = 'translateX(24px)';
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Navigation
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  navigate(dir) {
    if (this.state.currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone) this._finishAnim();
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    const next = currentScreen + dir;
    if (next < 0 || next > 4 || this._transitioning) return;
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, next, dir > 0 ? 1 : -1);
  }

  jumpTo(idx) {
    if (this._transitioning) return;
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    if (idx === currentScreen) return;
    if (currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone && idx > 0) this._finishAnim();
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, idx, idx > currentScreen ? 1 : -1);
  }

  _doTransition(from, to, dir) {
    this._transitioning = true;
    this.setState({ currentScreen: to });

    const c   = this.containerRef.current;
    const all = [...c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]')];
    const out = all[from];
    const inn = all[to];

    // Park off-screen
    all.forEach((s, i) => {
      if (i !== from && i !== to) {
        s.style.transition    = 'none';
        s.style.opacity       = '0';
        s.style.transform     = `translateX(${i < from ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
        s.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }
    });

    // Reset outgoing stagger elements so they don't hold stale transforms
    this._resetStagger(out);

    // Place incoming off-screen
    inn.style.transition  = 'none';
    inn.style.opacity     = '0';
    inn.style.transform   = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '24px' : '-24px'})`;
    inn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

    void inn.getBoundingClientRect(); // flush

    const DUR  = 460;
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';
    const FADE = 'cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';

    // Slide out
    out.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.55)}ms ${FADE}`;
    out.style.transform  = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
    out.style.opacity    = '0';

    // Slide in
    inn.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.65)}ms ${FADE}`;
    inn.style.transform  = 'translateX(0)';
    inn.style.opacity    = '1';

    // Stagger icon → text
    this._triggerStagger(inn);

    setTimeout(() => {
      out.style.transition    = 'none';
      out.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      inn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
      this._transitioning     = false;
    }, DUR + 80);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Stagger helpers
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _resetStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    if (icon) { icon.style.transition = 'none'; icon.style.transform = ''; icon.style.opacity = ''; }
    if (text) { text.style.transition = 'none'; text.style.transform = ''; text.style.opacity = ''; }
  }

  _triggerStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';

    const animEl = (el, delay) => {
      if (!el) return;
      el.style.transition = 'none';
      el.style.transform  = 'translateY(18px)';
      void el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const run = () => {
        el.style.transition = `transform 0.52s ${EASE}`;
        el.style.transform  = 'translateY(0)';
      };
      delay ? setTimeout(run, delay) : run();
    };

    animEl(icon, 0);
    animEl(text, 96);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Touch
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initTouch() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    const onStart = (e) => {
      this._touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      this._touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
    };
    const onEnd = (e) => {
      const dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - this._touchStartX;
      const dy = Math.abs(e.changedTouches[0].clientY - this._touchStartY);
      if (Math.abs(dx) > 40 && dy < 80) this.navigate(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
    };
    c.addEventListener('touchstart', onStart, { passive: true });
    c.addEventListener('touchend',   onEnd,   { passive: true });
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => {
      c.removeEventListener('touchstart', onStart);
      c.removeEventListener('touchend',   onEnd);
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Canvas / Particles
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initCanvas() {
    const tryStart = () => {
      const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
      if (!canvas) { setTimeout(tryStart, 100); return; }

      // Measure actual rendered size after layout
      setTimeout(() => {
        const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const W = Math.round(r.width)  || window.innerWidth;
        const H = Math.round(r.height) || window.innerHeight;
        canvas.width  = W;
        canvas.height = H;

        canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (this._particlesDone) this.navigate(1);
        });

        const run = () => this._runParticles(W, H);
        (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready)
          ? document.fonts.ready.then(run)
          : setTimeout(run, 700);
      }, 80);
    };
    tryStart();
  }

  _finishAnim() {
    if (this._rafId) { cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId); this._rafId = null; }
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (canvas) {
      const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      const fs  = this._fontSize(W);
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle   = '#e8eaf0';
      ctx.font        = `700 ${fs}px Charm`;
      ctx.textAlign   = 'center';
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
      ctx.fillText('ARIS', W / 2, H / 2);
    }
    this._particlesDone = true;
    this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
  }

  _fontSize(W) {
    return Math.min(Math.max(Math.round(W * 0.22), 72), 108);
  }

  _runParticles(W, H) {
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx  = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const CX   = W / 2;
    const CY   = H / 2;
    const FS   = this._fontSize(W);

    // Sample letter pixels from an offscreen canvas
    const off  = document.createElement('canvas');
    off.width  = W; off.height = H;
    const oc   = off.getContext('2d');
    oc.fillStyle = '#fff';
    oc.font      = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
    oc.textAlign = 'center';
    oc.textBaseline = 'middle';
    oc.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);

    const { data } = oc.getImageData(0, 0, W, H);
    const targets  = [];
    const STEP     = Math.max(4, Math.round(W / 88));

    for (let y = 0; y < H; y += STEP) {
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x += STEP) {
        if (data[(y * W + x) * 4 + 3] > 100) {
          targets.push({ x: x + STEP / 2, y: y + STEP / 2 });
        }
      }
    }

    if (!targets.length) { setTimeout(() => this._runParticles(W, H), 300); return; }

    // Shuffle so particles don't converge in raster order
    for (let i = targets.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      [targets[i], targets[j]] = [targets[j], targets[i]];
    }

    const SPREAD = Math.min(W, H) * 0.55;
    const particles = targets.map(t => {
      const ang = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const r   = 60  + Math.random() * SPREAD;
      const vx  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const vy  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const sx  = CX + Math.cos(ang) * r;
      const sy  = CY + Math.sin(ang) * r;
      return {
        sx, sy,
        endX: sx + vx * 30,
        endY: sy + vy * 30,
        targetX: t.x,
        targetY: t.y,
        vx, vy,
        size:  0.8 + Math.random() * 1.5,
        delay: Math.random() * 0.32,
      };
    });

    const T0    = performance.now();
    const DR    = 420;    // drift phase ms
    const CV    = 1900;   // converge phase ms
    const ST    = 340;    // settle/text fade ms
    const TOTAL = DR + CV + ST;

    const loop = (now) => {
      if (this._particlesDone) return;
      const el = now - T0;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

      particles.forEach(p => {
        const pe = el - p.delay * DR;
        if (pe <= 0) return;

        let px, py, alpha;

        if (pe < DR) {
          const dt = pe / DR;
          px    = p.sx + p.vx * dt * 30;
          py    = p.sy + p.vy * dt * 30;
          alpha = Math.min(dt * 2.2, 0.62);
          ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
          ctx.fillStyle   = '#6fa8e8';
        } else {
          const ct   = Math.min((pe - DR) / CV, 1);
          const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - ct, 4); // quartic ease-out
          px    = p.endX + (p.targetX - p.endX) * ease;
          py    = p.endY + (p.targetY - p.endY) * ease;
          alpha = 0.62 + ease * 0.38;
          // Interpolate blue (#6fa8e8) → near-white (#e8eaf0)
          const rr = Math.round(111 + (232 - 111) * ease);
          const gg = Math.round(168 + (234 - 168) * ease);
          const bb = Math.round(232 + (240 - 232) * ease);
          ctx.globalAlpha = Math.min(alpha, 1);
          ctx.fillStyle   = `rgb(${rr},${gg},${bb})`;
        }

        const sz = p.size * (pe < DR ? 1 : 1 + ((pe - DR) / CV) * 0.3);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(px, py, sz, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      });

      // Cross-fade crisp wordmark over settled dots
      if (el > DR + CV) {
        const t = Math.min((el - DR - CV) / ST, 1);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = t;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
      }

      if (el < TOTAL) {
        this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
      } else {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = 1;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
        this._particlesDone = true;
        this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
      }
    };

    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // renderVals
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  renderVals() {
    const { currentScreen, taglineVisible, entered } = this.state;

    const dotColor = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '#6fa8e8' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
    const dotWidth = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '22px' : '6px';

    return {
      containerRef: this.containerRef,
      canvasRef:    this.canvasRef,

      // Nav handlers
      goNext: () => this.navigate(1),
      goPrev: () => this.navigate(-1),
      skip:   () => this.jumpTo(4),
      goTo0:  () => this.jumpTo(0),
      goTo1:  () => this.jumpTo(1),
      goTo2:  () => this.jumpTo(2),
      goTo3:  () => this.jumpTo(3),
      goTo4:  () => this.jumpTo(4),

      // Visibility
      showPrev: currentScreen > 0,
      showNext: currentScreen < 4,
      showSkip: currentScreen < 4,

      // Tagline fade on screen 0
      taglineOpacity: taglineVisible ? '1' : '0',

      // Closing screen
      handleEntrar: () => this.setState({ entered: true }),
      comecarlabel:  entered ? 'Bem-vindo.' : 'Começar',
      entrarBg:     entered ? '#0d2e56' : '#1a4a8a',

      // Progress dots
      d0w: dotWidth(0), d0c: dotColor(0),
      d1w: dotWidth(1), d1c: dotColor(1),
      d2w: dotWidth(2), d2c: dotColor(2),
      d3w: dotWidth(3), d3c: dotColor(3),
      d4w: dotWidth(4), d4c: dotColor(4),
    };
  }
}
</script>


</body></html>

<html data-theme="dark"><head><style>
    .sc-placeholder{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;overflow:hidden}
    @keyframes sc-shine{0%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing{position:relative;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 5%,transparent);
      border-color:transparent}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing::before{content:'';
      position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(217,119,87,0) 25%,rgba(247,225,211,.95) 37%,rgba(217,119,87,0) 63%);
      background-size:400% 100%;animation:sc-shine 1.4s ease infinite}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-placeholder)::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-interp.sc-missing)::before{animation:none;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 8%,transparent)}
    .sc-placeholder-error{padding:4px 8px;font:11px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.7);word-break:break-word}
    .sc-interp.sc-missing{display:inline-block;width:2em;height:1em;overflow:hidden;
      vertical-align:text-bottom;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;color:transparent;
      user-select:none}
    .sc-interp.sc-unresolved{font-family:ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:.85em;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);border-radius:3px;
      padding:0 3px}
    .sc-host.sc-has-error{position:relative}
    .sc-logic-error{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;z-index:2147483647;max-width:60ch;
      padding:6px 10px;background:#b00020;color:#fff;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      border-radius:4px;white-space:pre-wrap;pointer-events:none}
    /* Mirrors PRINT_BASELINE_CSS in apps/web deck-stage-export.ts — keep both
       in sync until dc-runtime regains a build step. */
    @media print {
      @page { margin: 0.5cm; }
      section, article, figure, table { break-inside: avoid; }
      *, *::before, *::after {
        print-color-adjust: exact; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
        backdrop-filter: none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
        animation-delay: -99s !important; animation-duration: .001s !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; animation-fill-mode: both !important;
        animation-play-state: running !important; transition-duration: 0s !important;
      }
    }

      --border-faint:#DEE7F0;
      --border-hairline:rgba(114,132,153,0.16);
      --border-ghost:rgba(114,132,153,0.12);
      --border-ghost-2:rgba(114,132,153,0.08);
      --border-disabled:#D5DEE8;
      --accent-blue:#2F73E0;
      --accent-blue-strong:#1F5FC7;
      --accent-blue-soft:rgba(45,115,224,0.10);
      --accent-blue-soft-strong:rgba(45,115,224,0.16);
      --accent-blue-soft-text:#204C8B;
      --accent-blue-border:#4C84E3;
      --accent-blue-border-soft:rgba(45,115,224,0.24);
      --accent-blue-border-strong:rgba(45,115,224,0.36);
      --accent-blue-orbit:rgba(45,115,224,0.42);
      --accent-cyan:#1AA7C7;
      --accent-cyan-orbit:rgba(26,167,199,0.36);
      --accent-amber:#C98308;
      --accent-amber-strong:#A86D05;
      --accent-amber-soft:rgba(201,131,8,0.10);
      --accent-amber-soft-text:#8A5A07;
      --accent-amber-surface:rgba(201,131,8,0.09);
      --accent-amber-fill:rgba(201,131,8,0.14);
      --accent-amber-border:#D59220;
      --accent-amber-border-soft:rgba(201,131,8,0.22);
      --accent-amber-border-strong:rgba(201,131,8,0.32);
      --accent-amber-border-heavy:rgba(201,131,8,0.46);
      --accent-amber-cream:#FFF3D6;
      --accent-neutral-fill:#6E7E90;
      --accent-neutral-soft:rgba(114,132,153,0.08);
      --accent-neutral-soft-strong:rgba(114,132,153,0.16);
      --accent-neutral-border:#7A8B9E;
      --accent-neutral-border-strong:#617286;
      --accent-warning-soft:rgba(201,131,8,0.12);
      --accent-warning-border:rgba(201,131,8,0.28);
    }

    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    html,body{height:100%;background:var(--bg-canvas);color:var(--text-primary);font-family:'DM Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility}
    body{overflow:hidden}
    .first-access-shell{
      position:fixed;
      inset:0;
      z-index:140;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      padding:0;
      background:#05070B;
      overflow:auto;
    }
    .first-access-panel{
      width:100%;
      height:100%;
      padding:0;
      background:transparent;
      box-shadow:none;
      animation:none;
    }
    .first-access-frame{
      display:block;
      width:100%;
      height:100%;
      border:0;
      background:#05070B;
    }
    .first-access-kicker{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:8px;
      margin-bottom:20px;
      font-size:11px;
      font-weight:700;
      letter-spacing:0.16em;
      text-transform:uppercase;
      color:#7F8896;
    }
    .first-access-brand{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:10px;
      text-align:center;
      margin-bottom:18px;
    }
    .first-access-title{
      font-family:Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
      font-size:clamp(5rem, 18vw, 11.25rem);
      font-weight:700;
      line-height:0.9;
      letter-spacing:-0.04em;
      color:#E8EAF0;
    }
    .first-access-dots{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:118px;
      margin:18px auto 22px;
      max-width:420px;
    }
    .first-access-dots span{
      width:10px;
      height:10px;
      border-radius:50%;
      background:#6FA8E8;
      box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(111,168,232,0.04);
    }
    .first-access-body{
      max-width:420px;
      margin:0 auto 24px;
      text-align:center;
      font-size:14px;
      line-height:1.8;
      color:#98A3B3;
    }
    .first-access-actions{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .first-access-note{
      margin-top:18px;
      text-align:center;
      font-size:12px;
      line-height:1.7;
      color:#717A87;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border-soft);border-radius:3px}
    @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.25}}
    @keyframes riseIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

    button:focus-visible,
    input:focus-visible,
    select:focus-visible,
    summary:focus-visible{
      outline:2px solid var(--accent-blue-border);
      outline-offset:2px;
    }

    .control-toolbar{
      display:flex;
      align-items:flex-start;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:14px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      margin-bottom:18px;
    }
    .control-toolbar-copy{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:4px;
      min-width:0;
    }
    .control-toolbar-actions,
    .control-cluster{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .control-segmented,
    .control-stepper{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:4px;
      padding:4px;
      background:var(--bg-field-alt);
      border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
      border-radius:14px;
      box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--border-ghost);
    }
    .control-stepper{
      min-width:236px;
      justify-content:space-between;
    }
    .ui-btn{
      display:inline-flex !important;
      align-items:center !important;
      justify-content:center !important;
      gap:8px !important;
      min-height:42px !important;
      padding:10px 14px !important;
      border-radius:12px !important;
      border:1px solid var(--btn-border,var(--border-soft));
      background:var(--btn-bg,var(--bg-surface));
      color:var(--btn-color,var(--text-primary));
      font-size:12px !important;
      font-weight:700 !important;
      line-height:1.2 !important;
      cursor:var(--btn-cursor,pointer);
      opacity:var(--btn-opacity,1);
      pointer-events:var(--btn-events,auto);
      white-space:nowrap !important;
      box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.02),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
      transition:background-color 180ms ease,border-color 180ms ease,color 180ms ease,opacity 180ms ease;
    }
    .ui-btn:hover{
      background:var(--btn-hover-bg,var(--bg-hover));
      color:var(--btn-hover-color,var(--btn-color,var(--text-primary)));
    }
    .ui-btn-primary{
      --btn-bg:var(--accent-blue);
      --btn-border:var(--accent-blue-border);
      --btn-color:var(--text-on-accent);
      --btn-hover-bg:var(--accent-blue-strong);
    }
    .ui-btn-secondary{
      --btn-bg:var(--bg-surface);
      --btn-border:var(--border-strong);
      --btn-color:var(--text-primary);
      --btn-hover-bg:var(--bg-hover);
    }
    .ui-btn-neutral{
      --btn-bg:var(--bg-button-subtle);
      --btn-border:var(--border-soft);
      --btn-color:var(--text-primary);
      --btn-hover-bg:var(--bg-row-hover);
    }
    .ui-btn-link{
      --btn-bg:transparent;
      --btn-border:var(--accent-blue-border);
      --btn-color:var(--accent-blue);
      --btn-hover-bg:var(--accent-blue-soft);
    }
    .ui-btn-quiet{
      --btn-bg:transparent;
      --btn-border:var(--border-soft);
      --btn-color:var(--text-secondary);
      --btn-hover-bg:var(--bg-hover);
    }
    .ui-btn-warning{
      --btn-bg:var(--accent-amber-soft);
      --btn-border:var(--accent-amber-border-strong);
      --btn-color:var(--accent-amber);
      --btn-hover-bg:var(--accent-amber-soft);
    }
    .ui-btn-help{
      --btn-bg:transparent;
      --btn-border:transparent;
      --btn-color:var(--text-tertiary);
      --btn-hover-bg:transparent;
      padding:8px 2px !important;
      min-height:40px !important;
      font-weight:600 !important;
      text-decoration:underline;
      text-decoration-thickness:1px;
      text-underline-offset:3px;
      box-shadow:none;
    }
    .ui-btn-stateful{
      background:var(--btn-bg);
      border-color:var(--btn-border);
      color:var(--btn-color);
    }
    .ui-btn-pill{border-radius:999px !important}
    .ui-btn-compact{
      min-height:38px !important;
      padding:8px 12px !important;
    }
    .ui-btn-disabled{
      --btn-bg:var(--bg-disabled);
      --btn-border:var(--border-faint);
      --btn-color:var(--text-tertiary);
      --btn-opacity:.78;
      --btn-cursor:default;
      --btn-events:none;
      box-shadow:none;
    }
    .control-segmented .ui-btn,
    .control-stepper .ui-btn{
      min-height:38px !important;
      padding:8px 14px !important;
      border-radius:10px !important;
    }
    .control-stepper-label{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      min-height:38px;
      padding:8px 14px;
      border-radius:10px;
      font-size:12px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
      white-space:nowrap;
    }

    .screen-context-rail,
    .today-hero-spotlight,
    .help-guide-card{
      animation:riseIn 220ms ease;
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after{
        animation:none !important;
        transition:none !important;
        scroll-behavior:auto !important;
      }
    }

    .app-shell{display:flex;height:100vh;overflow:hidden}
    .sidebar-shell,.main-shell,.page-scroll{min-width:0}
    .page-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px 28px 48px;position:relative}
    .topbar-actions{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:flex-end;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .topbar-chip{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      min-height:40px;
      padding:8px 12px;
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
      border-radius:999px;
      font-size:11px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .topbar-next-card{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:3px;
      min-height:40px;
      min-width:220px;
      max-width:360px;
      padding:8px 12px;
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      border-radius:14px;
    }
    .topbar-next-card strong{
      font-size:10px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-subtle);
      text-transform:uppercase;
      letter-spacing:0.09em;
    }
    .topbar-next-card span{
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      line-height:1.45;
    }
    .sidebar-nav-button{
      width:100%;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:9px;
      padding:10px 12px;
      border-radius:10px;
      border:1px solid transparent;
      background:transparent;
      cursor:pointer;
      transition:background-color 180ms ease,border-color 180ms ease,box-shadow 180ms ease,color 180ms ease;
    }
    .sidebar-nav-button:hover{
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border-color:var(--border-hairline);
    }
    .dashboard-executive-grid{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));
      gap:12px;
      margin-bottom:14px;
    }
    .dashboard-executive-card{
      padding:16px 16px 15px;
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      border-radius:16px;
      box-shadow:0 10px 24px var(--surface-glow);
    }
    .workflow-strip{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      padding:14px 16px;
      margin-bottom:14px;
      background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg-surface-strong) 0%,var(--bg-surface) 100%);
      border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      border-radius:16px;
    }
    .workflow-step{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      min-height:38px;
      padding:8px 12px;
      background:var(--bg-surface-muted);
      border:1px solid var(--border-hairline);
      border-radius:999px;
      font-size:12px;
      font-weight:600;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .workflow-arrow{
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--text-subtle);
    }
    .inline-link-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:44px;padding:10px 0;line-height:1.3}
    .today-proof-toggle{min-height:44px;padding:4px 0}
    .ui-disclosure{
      background:var(--bg-surface-muted);
      border:1px solid var(--border-hairline);
      border-radius:14px;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .ui-disclosure > summary{
      list-style:none;
      cursor:pointer;
      display:flex;
      align-items:flex-start;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:12px;
      padding:14px 15px;
    }
    .ui-disclosure > summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
    .ui-disclosure-copy{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:4px;
      min-width:0;
    }
    .ui-disclosure-eyebrow{
      font-size:10px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-subtle);
      text-transform:uppercase;
      letter-spacing:0.09em;
    }
    .ui-disclosure-title{
      font-size:13px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
      line-height:1.5;
    }
    .ui-disclosure-summary{
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--text-tertiary);
      line-height:1.6;
    }
    .ui-disclosure-cta{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      flex-shrink:0;
      min-height:36px;
      padding:7px 11px;
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
      border-radius:999px;
      font-size:11px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .ui-disclosure-chevron{
      font-size:14px;
      line-height:1;
      transition:transform 180ms ease;
    }
    .ui-disclosure[open] .ui-disclosure-chevron{transform:rotate(180deg)}
    .help-faq-trigger{
      width:100%;
      min-height:60px;
      padding:17px 18px;
      background:transparent;
      border:none;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:16px;
      text-align:left;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .help-faq-trigger:hover{background:var(--bg-row-hover)}
    .help-faq-question{
      flex:1;
      min-width:0;
      font-size:15px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
      line-height:1.5;
    }
    .help-faq-chevron{
      width:20px;
      height:20px;
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      flex-shrink:0;
      transition:transform 200ms ease;
    }
    .help-faq-answer{
      padding:14px 18px 18px;
      border-top:1px solid var(--border-hairline);
      font-size:13px;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      line-height:1.75;
    }
    .ui-disclosure-body{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:10px;
      padding:0 15px 15px;
      border-top:1px solid var(--border-hairline);
    }
    .mobile-nav-toggle,
    .mobile-nav-backdrop,
    .availability-calendar-mobile,
    .agenda-day-cards-mobile,
    .availability-block-cards-mobile{display:none}
    .drawer-shell{max-width:100vw}
    .agenda-toolbar-shell{
      padding:16px 18px;
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      border-radius:18px;
      box-shadow:0 12px 28px var(--surface-glow);
    }
    .agenda-toolbar-copy{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:6px;
      min-width:0;
    }
    .agenda-toolbar-title{
      font-size:16px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
    }
    .agenda-toolbar-subtitle{
      font-size:13px;
      line-height:1.5;
      color:var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .agenda-toolbar-controls{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:flex-end;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .agenda-toggle-group,
    .agenda-nav-group{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:4px;
      padding:4px;
      background:var(--bg-field-alt);
      border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
      border-radius:12px;
      box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--border-ghost);
    }
    .agenda-nav-group{min-width:232px;justify-content:space-between}
    .agenda-toggle-group button{
      min-height:40px;
      padding:8px 14px;
      border-radius:9px;
      font-size:12px;
      font-weight:700;
    }
    .agenda-nav-icon,
    .agenda-nav-current{
      min-height:40px;
      border-radius:9px;
    }
    .agenda-nav-icon{
      width:40px;
      padding:0;
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      background:transparent;
      border:1px solid transparent;
      font-size:18px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-secondary);
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .agenda-nav-current{
      padding:8px 14px;
      background:transparent;
      border:1px solid transparent;
      font-size:12px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
      cursor:pointer;
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .agenda-help-link{
      padding:6px 4px;
      background:transparent;
      border:none;
      font-size:12px;
      font-weight:600;
      color:var(--text-tertiary);
      cursor:pointer;
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .agenda-day-shell,
    .agenda-week-shell{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:14px;
    }
    .agenda-day-hero,
    .agenda-day-summary-card,
    .agenda-day-panel,
    .agenda-week-summary-card{
      background:var(--bg-surface);
      border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      border-radius:18px;
    }
    .agenda-day-hero{
      padding:20px;
      background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg-surface-strong) 0%,var(--bg-surface) 100%);
    }
    .agenda-day-summary-grid,
    .agenda-week-summary-grid{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));
      gap:10px;
    }
    .agenda-week-summary-grid{
      grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));
    }
    .agenda-day-summary-card,
    .agenda-week-summary-card{
      padding:14px 14px 15px;
    }
    .agenda-day-main-grid{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.45fr) minmax(280px,0.85fr);
      gap:14px;
      align-items:start;
    }
    .agenda-day-panel{
      padding:18px 18px 16px;
    }
    .agenda-day-timeline,
    .agenda-day-alert-stack{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:10px;
    }
    .agenda-day-row{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:76px minmax(0,1fr) auto;
      gap:12px;
      align-items:start;
      padding:14px 15px;
      background:var(--bg-surface-muted);
      border:1px solid var(--border-hairline);
      border-radius:14px;
    }
    .agenda-day-row-free{
      background:var(--bg-shell);
      border-style:dashed;
    }
    .agenda-day-row-muted{opacity:0.68}
    .agenda-day-time{
      font-size:15px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
      font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
    }
    .agenda-day-title{
      font-size:14px;
      font-weight:700;
      color:var(--text-primary);
    }
    .agenda-day-support{
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--text-tertiary);
      line-height:1.6;
      margin-top:4px;
    }
    .agenda-day-empty{
      padding:18px 16px;
      background:var(--bg-surface-muted);
      border:1px dashed var(--border-soft);
      border-radius:14px;
    }
    .agenda-week-summary-strip{
      padding:15px 16px;
      background:var(--bg-surface-strong);
      border:1px solid var(--border-faint);
      border-radius:16px;
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--text-tertiary);
      line-height:1.6;
    }

    @media (max-width:1023px){
      .app-shell{height:100dvh !important}
      .sidebar-shell{
        position:fixed !important;
        top:0;
        bottom:0;
        width:min(86vw,320px) !important;
        min-width:0 !important;
        z-index:80;
        box-shadow:0 28px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.34);
        transition:left 180ms ease;
      }
      .mobile-nav-backdrop{
        display:block !important;
        position:fixed;
        inset:0;
        background:var(--overlay-backdrop);
        z-index:70;
      }
      .mobile-nav-toggle{
        display:inline-flex !important;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        width:44px;
        min-width:44px;
        height:44px;
        min-height:44px;
        border-radius:12px;
        background:var(--bg-surface);
        border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);
        color:var(--text-primary);
        cursor:pointer;
      }
      .topbar{
        height:auto !important;
        min-height:72px !important;

<script>
(function () {
  const THEME_KEY = 'aris_benchuix_theme';
  const ONBOARDING_KEY = 'aris_benchuix_onboarding_seen_v1';
  const safeGet = () => {
    try {
      return window.localStorage.getItem(THEME_KEY) === 'light' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    } catch (error) {
      return 'dark';
    }
  };
  const safeSet = (theme) => {
    const next = theme === 'light' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    try {
      window.localStorage.setItem(THEME_KEY, next);
    } catch (error) {}
    return next;
  };
  window.__arisBenchTheme = {
    key: THEME_KEY,
    get: safeGet,
    set: safeSet,
    toggle: function () {
      return safeSet(safeGet() === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light');
    }
  };
  const safeOnboardingGet = () => {
    try {
      return window.localStorage.getItem(ONBOARDING_KEY) === 'true';
    } catch (error) {
      return false;
    }
  };
  const safeOnboardingSet = (seen) => {
    try {
      if (seen) {
        window.localStorage.setItem(ONBOARDING_KEY, 'true');
      } else {
        window.localStorage.removeItem(ONBOARDING_KEY);
      }
    } catch (error) {}
    return seen;
  };
  window.__arisBenchOnboarding = {
    key: ONBOARDING_KEY,
    getSeen: safeOnboardingGet,
    markSeen: function () {
      return safeOnboardingSet(true);
    },
    clear: function () {
      return safeOnboardingSet(false);
    }
  };
  safeSet(safeGet());
})();
</script>

  formatMoney(value) {
    const whole = String(Math.round(Number(value) || 0));
    return 'R$ ' + whole.replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.');
  }

  normalizeSearch(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .normalize('NFD')
      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
      .toLowerCase();
  }

  timeToMinutes(label) {
    const match = String(label || '').match(/(\d{1,2})h(\d{2})?/);
    if (!match) return 0;
    return Number(match[1]) * 60 + Number(match[2] || 0);
  }

  formatCompactTime(minutes) {
    const hour = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
    const min = minutes % 60;
    return min ? String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + 'h' + String(min).padStart(2, '0') : String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + 'h';
  }

  formatHoursRange(start, end) {
    return this.formatCompactTime(start) + '–' + this.formatCompactTime(end);
  }

  parseTimeRange(label) {
    const value = String(label || '');

    if (!value || value.includes('dia todo')) {
      return null;
    }

    const sc-camel-explicit-range = value.match(/(\d{1,2})h(?:([0-5]\d))?\s*[–-]\s*(\d{1,2})h(?:([0-5]\d))?/);
    if (explicitRange) {
      return {
        start: Number(explicitRange[1]) * 60 + Number(explicitRange[2] || 0),
        end: Number(explicitRange[3]) * 60 + Number(explicitRange[4] || 0)
      };
    }

    const sc-camel-closes-at = value.match(/fecha às (\d{1,2})h(?:([0-5]\d))?/);
    if (closesAt) {
      return {
        start: 9 * 60,
        end: Number(closesAt[1]) * 60 + Number(closesAt[2] || 0)
      };
    }

    return null;
  }

  minutesToPercent(minutes, start, end) {
    const clamped = Math.max(start, Math.min(end, minutes));
    return ((clamped - start) / (end - start)) * 100;
  }

  agendaMonthName(date) {
    return ['janeiro', 'fevereiro', 'março', 'abril', 'maio', 'junho', 'julho', 'agosto', 'setembro', 'outubro', 'novembro', 'dezembro'][date.getUTCMonth()];
  }

  formatAgendaDateLabel(date) {
    return String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0') + '/' + String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  }

  formatAgendaFullDateLabel(date) {
    return this.agendaWeekdayName(date) + ', ' + date.getUTCDate() + ' de ' + this.agendaMonthName(date);
  }

  formatAgendaWeekRange(startDate, endDate) {
    if (startDate.getUTCMonth() === endDate.getUTCMonth()) {
      return 'Semana de ' + startDate.getUTCDate() + ' a ' + endDate.getUTCDate() + ' de ' + this.agendaMonthName(endDate);
    }
    return 'Semana de ' + startDate.getUTCDate() + ' de ' + this.agendaMonthName(startDate) + ' a ' + endDate.getUTCDate() + ' de ' + this.agendaMonthName(endDate);
  }
