    const sc-camel-appointment-rows = (appointments || []).map((item) => ({ type: 'appointment', ...item }));
    const sc-camel-free-rows = (freeSlots || []).map((item) => ({ type: 'free', ...item }));
    return [...appointmentRows, ...freeRows]
      .sort((a, b) => this.timeToMinutes(a.time) - this.timeToMinutes(b.time))
      .map((row) => {
        if (row.type === 'free') {
          return {
            ...row,
            isFree: true,
            isAppointment: false,
            freeRowStyle: 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr;align-items:center;padding:12px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-ghost)',
            freeLabelStyle: 'font-size:12px;color:var(--text-subtle);font-style:italic'
          };
        }

        const sc-camel-source-appointments = appointments || [];
        const sc-camel-is-active = row.status === 'in_service';
        const sc-camel-is-text-only = row.status === 'completed';
        const sc-camel-is-next = row.status === 'upcoming' && !sourceAppointments.some((item) => item.status === 'upcoming' && this.timeToMinutes(item.time) < this.timeToMinutes(row.time));
        const sc-camel-is-pill = row.status === 'upcoming';

        return {
          ...row,
          isFree: false,
          isAppointment: true,
          isActive,
          isTextOnly,
          isPill,
          isNext,
          statusPillStyle: 'display:inline-flex;align-items:center;background:var(--bg-chip);border:1px solid var(--border-soft);border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px',
          statusPillTextStyle: 'font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted)',
          activeSignalStyle: 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px',
          activeDotStyle: 'width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--text-tertiary);animation:pulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite',
          activeTextStyle: 'font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted)',
          previewContainerStyle: isActive
            ? 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:58px 1fr 52px 110px;align-items:center;padding:16px 22px;background:var(--accent-neutral-soft);border-bottom:1px solid var(--accent-neutral-soft-strong);border-left:3px solid var(--accent-neutral-border-strong)'
            : isNext
              ? 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:58px 1fr 52px 110px;align-items:center;padding:16px 22px;background:var(--bg-row);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-hairline)'
              : isTextOnly
                ? 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:58px 1fr 52px 110px;align-items:center;padding:16px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-ghost);opacity:0.56'
                : 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:58px 1fr 52px 110px;align-items:center;padding:16px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-hairline)',
          fullContainerStyle: isActive
            ? 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr 90px 90px 120px;align-items:center;padding:16px 24px;background:var(--accent-neutral-soft);border-bottom:1px solid var(--accent-neutral-soft-strong);border-left:3px solid var(--accent-neutral-border-strong)'
            : isNext
              ? 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr 90px 90px 120px;align-items:center;padding:16px 24px;background:var(--bg-row);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-hairline)'
              : isTextOnly
                ? 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr 90px 90px 120px;align-items:center;padding:16px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-ghost);opacity:0.56'
                : 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr 90px 90px 120px;align-items:center;padding:16px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-hairline)',
          previewTimeStyle: isTextOnly ? 'font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums' : 'font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums',
          fullTimeStyle: isTextOnly ? 'font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums' : 'font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums',
          previewNameStyle: isTextOnly ? 'font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-muted)' : 'font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary)',
          fullNameStyle: isTextOnly ? 'font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-muted)' : 'font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary)'
        };
      });
  }

  sc-camel-toggle-business-menu = () => this.setState((state) => ({
    businessMenuOpen: !state.businessMenuOpen,
    mobileNavOpen: state.mobileNavOpen,
    selectedApprovalId: null,
    selectedConversationId: null
  }));

  sc-camel-toggle-mobile-nav = () => this.setState((state) => ({
    mobileNavOpen: !state.mobileNavOpen,
    businessMenuOpen: state.mobileNavOpen ? state.businessMenuOpen : false,
    selectedApprovalId: null,
    selectedConversationId: null
  }));

  sc-camel-close-mobile-nav = () => this.setState({ mobileNavOpen: false, businessMenuOpen: false });

  shiftAgendaDay(direction) {
    const sequence = this.currentWeekDaySequence();
    const sc-camel-current-index = sequence.indexOf(this.state.agendaSelectedDayId);
    const sc-camel-safe-index = sc-camel-current-index === -1 ? sequence.indexOf(this.currentTodayDayId()) : currentIndex;
    const sc-camel-next-index = Math.max(0, Math.min(sequence.length - 1, safeIndex + direction));
    this.setState({ agendaSelectedDayId: sequence[nextIndex], businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });
  }

  sc-camel-reset-agenda-day = () => this.setState({ agendaSelectedDayId: this.currentTodayDayId(), businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });

  shiftAgendaWeek(direction) {
    this.setState((state) => ({
      agendaWeekOffset: Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, state.agendaWeekOffset + direction)),
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    }));
  }

  sc-camel-reset-agenda-week = () => this.setState({ agendaWeekOffset: 0, businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });

  shiftAvailabilityDay(direction) {
    const sequence = this.currentWeekDaySequence();
    const sc-camel-current-index = sequence.indexOf(this.state.availabilitySelectedDayId);
    const sc-camel-safe-index = sc-camel-current-index === -1 ? sequence.indexOf(this.currentTodayDayId()) : currentIndex;
    const sc-camel-next-index = Math.max(0, Math.min(sequence.length - 1, safeIndex + direction));
    this.setState({ availabilitySelectedDayId: sequence[nextIndex], businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });
  }

  sc-camel-reset-availability-day = () => this.setState({ availabilitySelectedDayId: this.currentTodayDayId(), businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });

  setScreen(screen) {
    const sc-camel-next-screen = screen;
    const sc-camel-next-state = { screen: nextScreen, selectedApprovalId: null, selectedConversationId: null, businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false };
    if (nextScreen === 'agenda') {
      nextState.availabilitySelectedDayId = this.currentTodayDayId();
    }
    if (nextScreen === 'disponibilidade') {
      nextState.availabilitySelectedDayId = this.currentTodayDayId();
    }
    this.setState(nextState);
  }

  applyTheme(theme) {
    const next = window.__arisBenchTheme && window.__arisBenchTheme.set ? window.__arisBenchTheme.set(theme) : theme;
    this.setState({ theme: next });
  }

  sc-camel-toggle-theme = () => {
    const next = this.state.theme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';
    this.applyTheme(next);
  };

  sc-camel-bind-exact-source-onboarding = (event) => {
    const frame = event && event.target ? event.target : null;
    if (!frame || !frame.contentDocument) {
      return;
    }
    if (this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup) {
      this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup();
      this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup = null;
    }
    const doc = frame.contentDocument;
    const normalize = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    const handler = (nativeEvent) => {
      const button = nativeEvent && nativeEvent.target && nativeEvent.target.closest ? nativeEvent.target.closest('button') : null;
      if (!button) {
        return;
      }
      const label = normalize(button.textContent);
      if (label === 'Começar' || label === 'Bem-vindo.') {
        nativeEvent.preventDefault();
        nativeEvent.stopPropagation();
        if (typeof nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation === 'function') {
          nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation();
        }
        this.completeFirstAccessOnboarding();
        return;
      }
      if (label === 'pular') {
        nativeEvent.preventDefault();
        nativeEvent.stopPropagation();
        if (typeof nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation === 'function') {
          nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation();
        }
        this.skipFirstAccessOnboarding();
      }
    };
    doc.addEventListener('click', handler, true);
    this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup = () => doc.removeEventListener('click', handler, true);
  };

  setWelcomeSeen(seen) {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.__arisBenchOnboarding) {
      if (seen && typeof window.__arisBenchOnboarding.markSeen === 'function') {
        window.__arisBenchOnboarding.markSeen();
      }
      if (!seen && typeof window.__arisBenchOnboarding.clear === 'function') {
        window.__arisBenchOnboarding.clear();
      }
      try {
        const key = window.__arisBenchOnboarding.key;
        if (key) {
          if (seen) {
            window.localStorage.setItem(key, 'true');
          } else {
            window.localStorage.removeItem(key);
          }
        }
      } catch (error) {}
    }
  }

  sc-camel-open-welcome-carousel = () => this.setState({
    onboardingSeen: true,
    showFirstAccessOnboarding: false,
    welcomeCarouselVisible: true,
    welcomeSlideIndex: 0,
    welcomeTouchStartX: null,
    selectedApprovalId: null,
    selectedConversationId: null,
    businessMenuOpen: false,
    mobileNavOpen: false,
    sandboxNotice: 'Boas-vindas reabertas neste navegador.'
  });

  closeWelcomeCarousel(notice) {
    this.setWelcomeSeen(true);
    this.setState({
      onboardingSeen: true,
      showFirstAccessOnboarding: false,
      welcomeCarouselVisible: false,
      welcomeSlideIndex: 0,
      welcomeTouchStartX: null,
      selectedApprovalId: null,
      selectedConversationId: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false,
      sandboxNotice: notice
    });
  }

  sc-camel-skip-welcome-carousel = () => this.closeWelcomeCarousel('Boas-vindas puladas neste navegador. Você pode rever em Meu Negócio.');

  sc-camel-complete-welcome-carousel = () => this.closeWelcomeCarousel('Boas-vindas concluídas. O dashboard segue pronto para uso neste navegador.');

  closeFirstAccessOnboarding(notice) {
    if (this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup) {
      this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup();
      this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup = null;
    }
    this.setWelcomeSeen(true);
    try {
      window.localStorage.setItem('aris_benchuix_onboarding_seen_v1', 'true');
    } catch (error) {}
    this.setState({
      onboardingSeen: true,
      showFirstAccessOnboarding: false,
      welcomeCarouselVisible: false,
      welcomeSlideIndex: 0,
      welcomeTouchStartX: null,
      selectedApprovalId: null,
      selectedConversationId: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false,
      sandboxNotice: notice
    });
  }

  sc-camel-skip-first-access-onboarding = () => this.closeFirstAccessOnboarding('Boas-vindas puladas neste navegador. O dashboard segue disponível aqui.');

  sc-camel-complete-first-access-onboarding = () => this.closeFirstAccessOnboarding('Boas-vindas concluídas. O dashboard segue pronto para uso neste navegador.');

  sc-camel-replay-first-access-onboarding = () => {
    if (this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup) {
      this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup();
      this._exactSourceOnboardingCleanup = null;
    }
    this.setWelcomeSeen(false);
    try {
      window.localStorage.removeItem('aris_benchuix_onboarding_seen_v1');
    } catch (error) {}
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.location && typeof window.location.reload === 'function') {
      window.location.reload();
      return;
    }
    this.setState({
      onboardingSeen: false,
      showFirstAccessOnboarding: true,
      welcomeCarouselVisible: false,
      welcomeSlideIndex: 0,
      welcomeTouchStartX: null,
      selectedApprovalId: null,
      selectedConversationId: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false,
      sandboxNotice: ''
    });
  };

  setWelcomeSlide(index) {
    const sc-camel-safe-index = Math.max(0, Math.min(WELCOME_SLIDES.length - 1, Number(index) || 0));
    this.setState({
      welcomeSlideIndex: safeIndex,
      welcomeTouchStartX: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    });
  }

  sc-camel-go-welcome-previous = () => this.setWelcomeSlide(this.state.welcomeSlideIndex - 1);

  sc-camel-go-welcome-next = () => this.setWelcomeSlide(this.state.welcomeSlideIndex + 1);

  sc-camel-handle-welcome-touch-start = (event) => {
    const touch = event.touches && event.touches[0];
    if (!touch) return;
    this.setState({ welcomeTouchStartX: touch.clientX });
  };

  sc-camel-handle-welcome-touch-end = (event) => {
    const touch = event.changedTouches && event.changedTouches[0];
    const { welcomeTouchStartX, welcomeSlideIndex } = this.state;
    if (!touch || sc-camel-welcome-touch-start-x == null) {
      this.setState({ welcomeTouchStartX: null });
      return;
    }
    const delta = touch.clientX - welcomeTouchStartX;
    if (Math.abs(delta) < WELCOME_SWIPE_THRESHOLD) {
      this.setState({ welcomeTouchStartX: null });
      return;
    }
    const sc-camel-next-index = delta < 0
      ? Math.min(WELCOME_SLIDES.length - 1, welcomeSlideIndex + 1)
      : Math.max(0, welcomeSlideIndex - 1);
    this.setState({
      welcomeSlideIndex: nextIndex,
      welcomeTouchStartX: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    });
  };

  updateBusinessProfile(field, value) {
    this.setState({ businessProfile: { ...this.state.businessProfile, [field]: value } });
  }

  parseClockValue(value) {
    const match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{2}):(\d{2})$/);
    if (!match) return null;
    return Number(match[1]) * 60 + Number(match[2]);
  }

  formatClockValue(minutes) {
    if (minutes == null) return '';
    const hour = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
    const min = minutes % 60;
    return String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(min).padStart(2, '0');
  }

  updateBusinessHour(dayId, field, value) {
    const minutes = this.parseClockValue(value);
    if (minutes == null) return;
    this.setState({
      businessHours: this.state.businessHours.map((item) => item.id === dayId ? { ...item, [field]: minutes } : item)
    });
  }

  toggleBusinessDayClosed(dayId) {
    this.setState({
      businessHours: this.state.businessHours.map((item) => item.id === dayId ? { ...item, isClosed: !item.isClosed } : item)
    });
  }

  toggleNotificationPreference(key) {
    this.setState({
      notificationPreferences: {
        ...this.state.notificationPreferences,
        [key]: !this.state.notificationPreferences[key]
      }
    });
  }

  updateHelpQuery(value) {

      helpQuery: value,
      helpCategory: String(value || '').trim() ? 'all' : state.helpCategory,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    }));

  setHelpCategory(category) {

    });

  sc-camel-clear-help-search = () => this.setState({

    mobileNavOpen: false
  });

  toggleHelpItem(id) {
    this.setState((state) => ({
      expandedHelpIds: state.expandedHelpIds.includes(id)
        ? state.expandedHelpIds.filter((item) => item !== id)
        : [...state.expandedHelpIds, id],
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    }));
  }

  openHelpTopic(id, category = 'all') {
    this.setState((state) => ({
      screen: 'ajuda',
      helpCategory: 'all',

      expandedHelpIds: state.expandedHelpIds.includes(id) ? state.expandedHelpIds : [...state.expandedHelpIds, id],
      selectedApprovalId: null,
      selectedConversationId: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    }));
  }

  setDemoMode(mode) {
    const notices = {
      normal: 'Operação base restaurada neste painel.',
      onboarding: 'Boas-vindas reabertas neste navegador.',
      empty: 'Cenário vazio aplicado para revisar estados sem movimento.',
      failure: 'Sinais de atenção exibidos apenas nesta leitura.'
    };

    this.setState((state) => ({
      demoMode: mode,
      onboardingDismissed: mode === 'onboarding' ? false : state.onboardingDismissed,
      welcomeCarouselVisible: mode === 'onboarding' ? true : state.welcomeCarouselVisible,
      welcomeSlideIndex: mode === 'onboarding' ? 0 : state.welcomeSlideIndex,
      welcomeTouchStartX: null,
      selectedApprovalId: null,
      selectedConversationId: null,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false,
      sandboxNotice: notices[mode] || 'Leitura atualizada neste painel.'
    }));
  }

  sc-camel-dismiss-onboarding = () => this.setState({
    onboardingDismissed: true,
    sandboxNotice: 'Painel guiado ocultado neste navegador. Você pode rever as boas-vindas em Meu Negócio.'
  });

  sc-camel-dismiss-notice = () => this.setState({ sandboxNotice: '' });

  openApproval(id) {
    this.setState({ selectedApprovalId: id, selectedConversationId: null, businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });
  }

  openConversation(id) {
    this.setState({ selectedConversationId: id, selectedApprovalId: null, businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });
  }

  sc-camel-close-any = () => this.setState({ selectedApprovalId: null, selectedConversationId: null, businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false });

  resolveSelectedApproval(decision) {
    this.setState((state) => {
      const approval = state.approvals.find((item) => item.id === state.selectedApprovalId);
      if (!approval) return {};
      const sc-camel-resolved-entry = { ...approval, decision };
      return {
        approvals: state.approvals.filter((item) => item.id !== approval.id),
        conversations: state.conversations.filter((item) => item.id !== approval.conversationId),
        resolvedApprovals: [...state.resolvedApprovals.filter((item) => item.id !== approval.id), resolvedEntry],
        expandedConversationIds: state.expandedConversationIds.filter((id) => id !== approval.conversationId),
        selectedApprovalId: null,
        selectedConversationId: null,
        sandboxNotice: decision === 'authorized'
          ? approval.clientName + ' foi autorizado e já aparece na agenda de amanhã.'
          : approval.clientName + ' foi recusado e saiu das filas de Hoje, Atendimento e Aprovações.'
      };
    });
  }

  sc-camel-authorize-selected-approval = () => this.resolveSelectedApproval('authorized');

  sc-camel-reject-selected-approval = () => this.resolveSelectedApproval('rejected');

  toggleConversationExpansion(id) {
    this.setState((state) => ({
      expandedConversationIds: state.expandedConversationIds.includes(id)
        ? state.expandedConversationIds.filter((item) => item !== id)
        : [...state.expandedConversationIds, id],
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    }));
  }

  openBlockFormWithPreset(overrides = {}) {
    this.setState({
      blockFormOpen: true,
      editingBlockId: null,
      blockDraft: this.defaultBlockDraft(overrides),
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false
    });
  }

  sc-camel-open-block-form = () => this.openBlockFormWithPreset();

  editBlock(id) {
    const block = this.state.availabilityBlocks.find((item) => item.id === id);
    if (!block) return;
    this.setState({
      blockFormOpen: true,
      editingBlockId: id,
      businessMenuOpen: false,
      mobileNavOpen: false,
      blockDraft: this.defaultBlockDraft({
        dayLabel: block.dayLabel,
        timeLabel: block.timeLabel,
        reason: block.reason,
        kind: block.kind
      })
    });
  }

  sc-camel-cancel-block-form = () => this.setState({
    blockFormOpen: false,
    editingBlockId: null,
    blockDraft: this.defaultBlockDraft()
  });

  updateBlockDraft(field, value) {
    this.setState({ blockDraft: { ...this.state.blockDraft, [field]: value } });
  }

  sc-camel-save-block = () => this.setState((state) => {
    const draft = {
      dayLabel: String(state.blockDraft.dayLabel || '').trim(),
      timeLabel: String(state.blockDraft.timeLabel || '').trim(),
      reason: String(state.blockDraft.reason || '').trim(),
      kind: String(state.blockDraft.kind || '').trim() || 'bloqueio parcial'
    };

    if (!draft.dayLabel || !draft.timeLabel || !draft.reason) {
      return { sandboxNotice: 'Preencha dia/data, horário e motivo antes de salvar o bloqueio.' };
    }

    if (state.editingBlockId) {
      return {
        availabilityBlocks: state.availabilityBlocks.map((item) => item.id === state.editingBlockId ? { ...item, ...draft } : item),
        blockFormOpen: false,
        editingBlockId: null,
        blockDraft: this.defaultBlockDraft(),
        sandboxNotice: 'Bloqueio atualizado na lista.'
      };
    }

    const sc-camel-next-id = 'blk-' + state.nextBlockId;
    return {
      availabilityBlocks: [...state.availabilityBlocks, { id: nextId, ...draft }],
      nextBlockId: state.nextBlockId + 1,
      blockFormOpen: false,
      editingBlockId: null,
      blockDraft: this.defaultBlockDraft(),
      sandboxNotice: 'Bloqueio adicionado à lista.'
    };
  });

  removeBlock(id) {
    this.setState((state) => ({
      availabilityBlocks: state.availabilityBlocks.filter((item) => item.id !== id),
      blockFormOpen: state.editingBlockId === id ? false : state.blockFormOpen,
      editingBlockId: state.editingBlockId === id ? null : state.editingBlockId,
      blockDraft: state.editingBlockId === id ? this.defaultBlockDraft() : state.blockDraft,
      sandboxNotice: 'Bloqueio removido da lista.'
    }));
  }

  renderVals() {
    const {
      screen,
      agendaView,
      agendaSelectedDayId,
      agendaWeekOffset,
      availabilitySelectedDayId,
      approvals,
      conversations,
      appointments,
      freeSlots,
      availabilityBlocks,
      selectedApprovalId,
      selectedConversationId,
      blockFormOpen,
      editingBlockId,
      blockDraft,
      sandboxNotice,
      theme,
      businessMenuOpen,
      mobileNavOpen,
      expandedConversationIds,
      resolvedApprovals,
      businessProfile,
      businessHours,
      notificationPreferences,
      demoMode,
      showFirstAccessOnboarding,
      welcomeCarouselVisible,
      welcomeSlideIndex,
      onboardingDismissed,
      helpQuery,
      helpCategory,
      expandedHelpIds
    } = this.state;

    const nav = (s) => ({
      bg: screen === s ? 'var(--accent-blue-soft)' : 'transparent',
      color: screen === s ? 'var(--text-primary)' : 'var(--text-tertiary)',
      fw: screen === s ? '700' : '600',
      ic: screen === s ? 'var(--accent-blue)' : 'var(--text-tertiary)',
      bd: screen === s ? 'var(--accent-blue-border-soft)' : 'transparent',
      shadow: screen === s ? 'inset 0 0 0 1px var(--border-ghost), 0 8px 20px rgba(8,12,18,0.12)' : 'none'
    });

    const titles = {
      hoje: 'Hoje',
      agenda: 'Agenda',
      disponibilidade: 'Disponibilidade',
      atendimento: 'Atendimento',
      aprovacoes: 'Aprovações',
      estimativa: 'Estimativa do dia',
      configuracoes: 'Meu Negócio',
      ajuda: 'Ajuda'
    };

    const known = ['hoje', 'agenda', 'disponibilidade', 'atendimento', 'aprovacoes', 'estimativa', 'configuracoes', 'ajuda'];

      const sc-camel-special-hours = blocksForDay.find((item) => item.kind === 'horário especial');
      const sc-camel-full-closure = blocksForDay.find((item) => item.kind === 'dia fechado' || item.kind === 'feriado');

      let sc-camel-open-start = day.openStart;
      let sc-camel-open-end = day.openEnd;
      let sc-camel-state-label = day.defaultState;
      let sc-camel-hours-label = day.openStart != null ? this.formatHoursRange(day.openStart, day.openEnd) : 'sem atendimento';
      let sc-camel-has-open-band = openStart != null && openEnd != null;
      let sc-camel-closed-note = '';
      let sc-camel-closed-note-style = '';

      if (specialHours) {
        const range = this.parseTimeRange(specialHours.timeLabel);
        if (range) {
          sc-camel-open-end = range.end;
          sc-camel-hours-label = this.formatHoursRange(openStart, openEnd);
          sc-camel-state-label = 'encerra cedo';
        }
      }

      if (fullClosure) {
        sc-camel-open-start = null;
        sc-camel-open-end = null;
        sc-camel-has-open-band = false;
        sc-camel-state-label = fullClosure.kind === 'feriado' ? 'feriado' : 'fechado';
        sc-camel-hours-label = fullClosure.reason;
        sc-camel-closed-note = fullClosure.kind === 'feriado' ? 'Dia indisponível' : 'Sem atendimento';
        sc-camel-closed-note-style = 'position:absolute;left:12px;right:12px;bottom:12px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg-disabled);border:1px solid var(--border-faint);border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center';
      }

      const events = [];

      if (partialBlock) {
        const range = this.parseTimeRange(partialBlock.timeLabel);
        if (range) {
          const meta = this.kindMeta(partialBlock.kind);
          const top = this.minutesToPercent(range.start, 8 * 60, 20 * 60);
          const bottom = this.minutesToPercent(range.end, 8 * 60, 20 * 60);
          events.push({
            title: partialBlock.reason,
            subtitle: partialBlock.timeLabel,
            cardStyle: 'position:absolute;left:10px;right:10px;top:calc(' + top.toFixed(2) + '% + 8px);height:calc(' + Math.max(bottom - top, 11).toFixed(2) + '% - 12px);min-height:58px;padding:10px 10px 9px;background:' + meta.timelineFill + ';border:1px solid ' + meta.timelineStroke + ';border-radius:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between'
          });
          sc-camel-state-label = 'bloqueio parcial';
          sc-camel-hours-label = partialBlock.timeLabel + ' · ' + partialBlock.reason;
        }
      }

      if (specialHours && !fullClosure) {
        const meta = this.kindMeta(specialHours.kind);
        const sc-camel-close-top = this.minutesToPercent(openEnd, 8 * 60, 20 * 60);
        events.push({
          title: specialHours.reason,
          subtitle: specialHours.timeLabel,
          cardStyle: 'position:absolute;left:10px;right:10px;top:calc(' + Math.max(closeTop - 12, 10).toFixed(2) + '%);min-height:54px;padding:10px 10px 9px;background:' + meta.timelineFill + ';border:1px solid ' + meta.timelineStroke + ';border-radius:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between'
        });
      }

      const sc-camel-open-band-style = hasOpenBand
        ? 'position:absolute;left:10px;right:10px;top:' + this.minutesToPercent(openStart, 8 * 60, 20 * 60).toFixed(2) + '%;height:' + (this.minutesToPercent(openEnd, 8 * 60, 20 * 60) - this.minutesToPercent(openStart, 8 * 60, 20 * 60)).toFixed(2) + '%;background:linear-gradient(180deg, var(--border-hairline), var(--surface-glow));border:1px solid var(--border-hairline);border-radius:14px'
        : '';

      const sc-camel-state-tone = sc-camel-state-label === 'bloqueio parcial'
        ? this.kindMeta('bloqueio parcial').statePillStyle
        : sc-camel-state-label === 'encerra cedo'

          : sc-camel-state-label === 'aberto'
            ? 'background:var(--bg-row);border:1px solid var(--border-faint);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px'
            : this.kindMeta('dia fechado').statePillStyle;

      const sc-camel-blocked-ranges = blocksForDay
        .map((item) => this.parseTimeRange(item.timeLabel))
        .filter(Boolean);
      const sc-camel-slot-buttons = [];
      if (hasOpenBand && !fullClosure) {
        for (let cursor = openStart; cursor + 120 <= openEnd; cursor += 120) {
          const sc-camel-slot-end = cursor + 120;
          const sc-camel-overlaps-block = blockedRanges.some((range) => Math.max(range.start, cursor) < Math.min(range.end, slotEnd));
          if (!overlapsBlock) {
            const top = this.minutesToPercent(cursor, 8 * 60, 20 * 60);
            const bottom = this.minutesToPercent(slotEnd, 8 * 60, 20 * 60);
            slotButtons.push({
              id: day.id + '-slot-' + cursor,
              label: this.formatCompactTime(cursor),
              shellStyle: 'position:absolute;left:12px;right:12px;top:calc(' + top.toFixed(2) + '% + 6px);height:calc(' + Math.max(bottom - top, 9).toFixed(2) + '% - 10px);min-height:30px;border:1px dashed var(--border-ghost);border-radius:10px;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 8px',
              onSelect: () => this.openBlockFormWithPreset({
                dayLabel: day.matchKey,
                timeLabel: this.formatHoursRange(cursor, slotEnd),
                reason: 'Bloqueio manual',
                kind: 'bloqueio parcial'
              })
            });
          }
        }
      }

      return {
        ...day,
        dateColor: day.isToday ? 'var(--text-primary)' : 'var(--text-muted)',
        columnShellStyle: day.isToday
          ? 'background:var(--bg-surface-strong);border:1px solid var(--border-soft);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden'

    const sc-camel-availability-sequence = availabilityCalendarDays.map((day) => day.id);
    const sc-camel-find-next-open-day = (startIndex) => {
      for (let index = startIndex + 1; index < availabilityCalendarDays.length; index += 1) {
        const day = availabilityCalendarDays[index];
        if (day && day.hasOpenBand) return day;
      }
      for (let index = 0; index <= startIndex; index += 1) {
        const day = availabilityCalendarDays[index];
        if (day && day.hasOpenBand) return day;
      }
      return null;
    };
    const sc-camel-format-suggestion-label = (day) => {

      return nextSlot ? day.dayLabel + ' · ' + nextSlot : day.dayLabel + ' · ' + day.hoursLabel;
    };
    const sc-camel-current-today-availability-index = availabilitySequence.indexOf(currentTodayDayId);

    const sc-camel-tomorrow-blocked-demand = effectiveApprovals.some((item) => /amanh[ãa].*fechad|amanh[ãa].*indispon|amanh[ãa].*feriad/i.test(String(item.reason || '') + ' ' + String(item.requestedSlot || '')));
    const sc-camel-tomorrow-operations-alert-visible = Boolean((tomorrowAvailabilityDay && !tomorrowAvailabilityDay.hasOpenBand) || tomorrowBlockedDemand);
    const sc-camel-tomorrow-operations-suggestion = formatSuggestionLabel(tomorrowFallbackDay);
    const sc-camel-tomorrow-operations-alert-title = tomorrowBlockedDemand
      ? 'Amanhã está fechado para novos horários.'
      : tomorrowAvailabilityDay
      ? tomorrowAvailabilityDay.stateLabel === 'feriado'

      setDisponibilidade: () => this.setScreen('disponibilidade'),
      setAprovacoes: () => this.setScreen('aprovacoes'),
      setEstimativa: () => this.setScreen('estimativa'),
      setConfiguracoes: () => this.setScreen('configuracoes'),
      setAjuda: () => this.setScreen('ajuda'),

      completeFirstAccessOnboarding: this.completeFirstAccessOnboarding,

      replayFirstAccessOnboarding: this.replayFirstAccessOnboarding,
      openWelcomeCarousel: this.openWelcomeCarousel,
      goWelcomePrevious: this.goWelcomePrevious,
      goWelcomeNext: this.goWelcomeNext,
      skipWelcomeCarousel: this.skipWelcomeCarousel,
      completeWelcomeCarousel: this.completeWelcomeCarousel,
      handleWelcomeTouchStart: this.handleWelcomeTouchStart,
      handleWelcomeTouchEnd: this.handleWelcomeTouchEnd,
      openHelpPrimeirosPassos: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-sistema-marca-sozinho'),
      openHelpDiaRisco: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-aprovar-excecao'),
      openHelpAgenda: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-remarcar-cancelar'),
      openHelpDisponibilidade: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-bloquear-horario'),
      openAgendaBlockForm: () => this.openBlockFormWithPreset(agendaBlockPreset),
      openHelpAtendimento: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-priorizar-conversa'),
      openHelpAprovacoes: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-aprovar-excecao'),
      openHelpConfiguracoes: () => this.openHelpTopic('help-mudar-funcionamento'),
      setThemeLight: () => this.applyTheme('light'),
      setThemeDark: () => this.applyTheme('dark'),
      toggleTheme: this.toggleTheme,
      toggleMobileNav: this.toggleMobileNav,
      closeMobileNav: this.closeMobileNav,
      toggleBusinessMenu: this.toggleBusinessMenu,
      onBusinessNameChange: (event) => this.updateBusinessProfile('name', event.target.value),
      onBusinessAddressChange: (event) => this.updateBusinessProfile('address', event.target.value),
      onBusinessPhoneChange: (event) => this.updateBusinessProfile('phone', event.target.value),
      setAgendaDayView: () => this.setState({ agendaView: 'day', businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false }),
      setAgendaWeekView: () => this.setState({ agendaView: 'week', businessMenuOpen: false, mobileNavOpen: false }),
      goAgendaPrevious: sc-camel-agenda-view === 'week' ? () => this.shiftAgendaWeek(-1) : () => this.shiftAgendaDay(-1),
      goAgendaToday: sc-camel-agenda-view === 'week' ? this.resetAgendaWeek : this.resetAgendaDay,
      goAgendaNext: sc-camel-agenda-view === 'week' ? () => this.shiftAgendaWeek(1) : () => this.shiftAgendaDay(1),
      goAvailabilityPrevious: () => this.shiftAvailabilityDay(-1),
      goAvailabilityToday: this.resetAvailabilityDay,
      goAvailabilityNext: () => this.shiftAvailabilityDay(1),
      closeAny: this.closeAny,
      drawerT: selectedApprovalId ? 'translateX(0)' : 'translateX(110%)',
      atendT: selectedConversationId ? 'translateX(0)' : 'translateX(110%)',
      overlayOp: anyOpen ? '1' : '0',
      overlayPE: anyOpen ? 'auto' : 'none',
      hasSandboxNotice: Boolean(sandboxNotice),
      sandboxNotice,
      dismissNotice: this.dismissNotice,
      dismissOnboarding: this.dismissOnboarding,
      authorizeSelectedApproval: this.authorizeSelectedApproval,
      rejectSelectedApproval: this.rejectSelectedApproval,
      setDemoModeNormal: () => this.setDemoMode('normal'),
      setDemoModeOnboarding: () => this.setDemoMode('onboarding'),
      setDemoModeEmpty: () => this.setDemoMode('empty'),
      setDemoModeFailure: () => this.setDemoMode('failure'),
      helpQuery,
      onHelpQueryInput: (event) => this.updateHelpQuery(event.target.value),
      clearHelpSearch: this.clearHelpSearch,
      openBlockForm: this.openBlockForm,
      openBlockFormWithPreset: this.openBlockFormWithPreset,
      saveBlock: this.saveBlock,
      cancelBlockForm: this.cancelBlockForm,
      blockFormOpen,
      blockFormTitle: editingBlockId ? 'Editar bloqueio' : 'Novo bloqueio',
      blockDraft,
      onBlockDayChange: (event) => this.updateBlockDraft('dayLabel', event.target.value),
      onBlockTimeChange: (event) => this.updateBlockDraft('timeLabel', event.target.value),
      onBlockReasonChange: (event) => this.updateBlockDraft('reason', event.target.value),
      onBlockKindChange: (event) => this.updateBlockDraft('kind', event.target.value)
    };
  }
}
